title: nemastylis nuttallii
intro: Nemastylis nuttallii, also known as the Yellow Water Lily or Western Yellow Water Lily, is a perennial aquatic plant native to the western United States. This plant is used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Nemastylis nuttallii include reducing inflammation and improving skin conditions such as acne and eczema, as well as aiding in wound healing and reducing fever. Herbal preparations of Nemastylis nuttallii include infusions, decoctions, and poultices, which can be used to make salves and creams for topical application.
